## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Why This Change Was Made

Explain the problem being solved or the reason for the update.

## Linked Issue / Task

Closes #

## Scope Notes

Call out any important scope boundaries or intentional exclusions.

## Implementation Notes

Summarize key implementation details, design choices, or tradeoffs.

## Testing

Describe what was validated.
- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Integration tests added or updated
- [ ] End-to-end tests added or updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Validation could not be completed fully in this context

## Evidence

Include test output, screenshots, sample API responses, logs, or other supporting evidence as appropriate.

## Risk Assessment

Describe notable risks, edge cases, or areas needing reviewer attention.

## Security / Privacy Impact

Indicate whether this affects:
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Authorization
- [ ] Secrets / credentials
- [ ] Sensitive data handling
- [ ] Logging / auditability
- [ ] Third-party dependencies
- [ ] None of the above

## Data / API / Migration Impact

Indicate whether this affects:
- [ ] Schema or migrations
- [ ] Public API contracts
- [ ] Configuration or environment variables
- [ ] Backward compatibility
- [ ] Deployment / rollback behavior
- [ ] None of the above

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] Architecture docs updated if needed
- [ ] Runbooks updated if needed
- [ ] ADR added or updated if needed
- [ ] No documentation changes required

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is scoped to one coherent task
- [ ] Repository conventions were followed
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where appropriate
- [ ] Security implications were considered
- [ ] Documentation was updated where needed
- [ ] Follow-up work is identified if anything was deferred

## Follow-Up Work

List any follow-up items, cleanup, or deferred work here.
